nasb.text: You shall make its dishes and its pans and its jars and its bowls with which to pour drink offerings; you shall make them of pure gold.

esv.text: And you shall make its plates and dishes for incense, and its flagons and bowls with which to pour drink offerings; you shall make them of pure gold.

cnv.text: 你要做桌子上的盤子、碟子、酒杯和奠酒用的瓶，這些你要用純金製造。

ccb.text: 你们要用纯金造桌子上的盘、碟和献酒用的杯和瓶。
